retrieved_result: Ajo Arizona (AZ 85321) Fact Sheet "Ajo Arizona (AZ 85321) Fact Sheet The current location of Ajo, Arizona was founded by the New Cornelia Copper Company, a subsidiary of Calumet and Arizona Mining Company, in about 1915.
